scenario.scene: Sunlit pilates studio, cream-colored mat unrolled on the warm wood floor, a sage-green reformer in the background out of focus. A tall window on the right floods morning light into the room.
scenario.outfit: Soft dusty pink seamless sports bra with crossback straps, matching dusty pink high-waist leggings, a thin gold anklet on her left ankle. Hair down, soft beach waves with a center part. No makeup, glowy fresh skin. Bare feet.
scenario.pose: Sitting cross-legged on the mat, posture upright, hands resting in her lap, looking down at the box with a soft contemplative smile.

hand_assignment.other_hand_does: holds the box together in her lap

scenario.grip_or_placement: Both hands cradle the Alluvi box in her lap, palms facing up and slightly together, the box resting on her fingertips with the front face angled toward the camera at a slight upward tilt. Thumbs rest on either side of the front face.
scenario.lighting: Bright soft morning daylight from a tall window on her right, warm bone tones across the wood floor and mat, gentle warm wash on her right side and on the box surface.
scenario.palette: dusty pink, warm wood, cream mat, sage green
scenario.camera_height: slightly below her eye line, looking up
resolves_failure_modes: outfit lock — saturated pink unlike white reference
scenario.notes: Tests two-hand grip. Different from the standard one-hand pinch — both thumbs frame the front face.

step_1_output.step_1_image_prompt: A 25-year-old Mediterranean woman with sun-kissed deep-tan skin, green almond eyes, and brunette-with-blonde-balayage waves to her mid-back, captured in a candid amateur smartphone snapshot with natural skin texture and visible pores. She is wearing a soft dusty pink seamless sports bra with crossback straps, matching dusty pink high-waist leggings, a thin gold anklet on her left ankle, hair down in soft beach waves with a center part, no makeup with glowy fresh skin, bare feet. She sits on a cream-colored pilates mat unrolled on a warm wood floor, a sage-green reformer softly out of focus in the background, a tall window on the right flooding the room with morning light. Sitting cross-legged on the mat, posture upright, soft contemplative smile, gaze gently lowered toward her lap. Both hands rest in her lap, palms facing up and slightly together in a soft cradle position, fingers lightly cupped, thumbs relaxed on either side, currently empty. Bright soft morning daylight from the tall window on her right, warm bone tones across the wood floor and mat, gentle warm wash on her right side. Shot on iPhone 15 Pro 35mm equivalent, slightly below her eye line looking up. Real photograph, not AI-generated, no model pose, candid moment. Morning intention-setting peaceful mood, palette of dusty pink, warm wood, cream mat, sage green. Reference image is the persona — preserve her face, eye color, eye shape, brow shape, nose shape, lip shape, jaw line, and hair color exactly. Do not improvise her face.

fal_pulid_params.negative_prompt: extra limbs, deformed hands, mutated hands, bad anatomy, lowres, blurry, watermark, text, signature, extra fingers, fused fingers, distorted face, asymmetric eyes, unnatural skin texture, plastic skin, AI-generated look, model pose, perfect symmetry, smooth airbrushed skin, glossy plastic skin, illustration, 3D render, CGI, doll-like features, magazine retouching

step_2_brief.intended_grip_or_placement: Both hands cradle the Alluvi box in her lap, palms facing up and slightly together, the box resting on her fingertips with the front face angled toward the camera at a slight upward tilt. Thumbs rest on either side of the front face.
step_2_brief.intended_product_position: Step 2 will composite the Alluvi box held flat across both hands in her lap, front face tilted slightly upward toward the camera so the morning window light catches it cleanly. Step 2 may adjust her wrist angles and finger curl to physically cradle the actual product geometry.

id_weight_recommendation.reasoning: id_weight at fal API cap (1.0). true_cfg at default 1.5 — three-quarter framing head-to-crossed-knees with face mid-importance, default sufficient alongside the dusty pink outfit override which strongly contradicts the white reference photo.

step_2_output.step_2_image_prompt: Take the persona reference photo as the locked source for her face, green almond eyes, brunette-with-blonde-balayage waves, sun-kissed Mediterranean skin, dusty pink sports bra and matching high-waist leggings, gold anklet, bare feet, and the entire pilates studio scene including the cream mat, warm wood floor, and sage-green reformer in the background — all of these must remain faithful to the reference. She is now cradling the Alluvi product across both hands in her lap: both palms facing up and slightly together, fingers lightly cupped under the box, the box resting flat across her fingertips with the front face tilted slightly upward toward the camera, both thumbs resting on either side of the front face framing it symmetrically. The product is approximately 7 inches wide, sized realistically relative to her hands and lap. Her wrist angles and finger curl may shift slightly to physically cradle the box naturally and not look stamped on. Both hands must remain visible cradling the product together in her lap. Do not hide either hand behind the box, behind her knees, or crop them out of the frame. The Alluvi product packaging must match the product reference photo exactly — every text element, color, graphic, and certification badge as shown. Preserve the packaging's natural white base color, only apply the scene's directional lighting on top. Match the lighting direction of the persona scene: bright soft morning daylight from the tall window on her right, warm bone tones across the wood floor and mat, gentle warm wash on her right side and on the box surface, with a soft shadow falling toward her lower-left.
